Volatility Warden.Tagline: Calmest when the market is bleeding.
Volatility Warden.Synopsis: You buy when it hurts and hold through the part of the cycle that breaks other people. A falling market invites you in.
Volatility Warden.Shadow: You can hold too long, reading a real break as one more panic. The tolerance that saves you in a correction can trap you in a regime change.

Momentum Navigator.Tagline: Knows exactly when to leave the party.
Momentum Navigator.Synopsis: You ride the move while it is alive and step off the second it stalls. You trade motion, and you never overstay the party.
Momentum Navigator.Shadow: In a choppy, directionless market you get chopped up. In and out on false signals. You need a real trend to work, and you bleed when there isn't one.

Pattern Sentinel.Tagline: No setup, no trade. No exceptions.
Pattern Sentinel.Synopsis: Every trade clears the checklist or it does not happen. Your edge is how much you are willing to refuse.
Pattern Sentinel.Shadow: When the market stops printing textbook setups, you sit out. The discipline that protects you can harden into rigidity, and the refusal to adapt has its own cost.

Contrarian Intuit.Synopsis: When the whole room agrees, you start looking for the exit. You read positioning over headlines and lean against certainty at its loudest.
Contrarian Intuit.Shadow: Early looks exactly like wrong until it isn't. You can bleed against a trend that runs further than reason allows.

Rhythm Steward.Synopsis: You think in seasons, not sessions. You wait out the cycle, and when the turn comes you are the one already ready.
Rhythm Steward.Shadow: You can be early by an uncomfortable margin. When a cycle breaks its old rhythm, you are positioned for a turn that does not arrive on schedule.

Steady Cultivator.Tagline: Buys it once, holds it for years.
Steady Cultivator.Synopsis: A few positions, chosen carefully, held for years. You let compounding do the work and treat selling as the exception.
Steady Cultivator.Shadow: The conviction that lets you hold a winner can keep you married to a thesis that has quietly broken. You anchor, and you are slow to see when the story changed.

Breakout Hunter.Tagline: Lives for the moment it rips.
Breakout Hunter.Synopsis: You trade the instant the coil releases. In as the move begins, out before it matures, because the first move is the whole point.
Breakout Hunter.Shadow: The market fakes far more breakouts than it delivers. Your eagerness to catch the release can bleed you out across the ones that fail.

Risk Alchemist.Tagline: Loses small on purpose, wins big by design.
Risk Alchemist.Synopsis: You design the payoff before you take the trade. Small deliberate losses buy the occasional outsized win, and the structure does the heavy lifting.
Risk Alchemist.Shadow: You can trust the structure too much. A payoff is only as sound as its assumptions, and you can engineer a flawless bet around a risk that was mispriced from the start.

Trend Tactician.Tagline: Feels the turn before the chart does.
Trend Tactician.Synopsis: You feel the change in slope before it has a name. By the time the shift is obvious, you have been positioned for weeks.
Trend Tactician.Shadow: Your reads are early, which makes them fragile. A shift that never develops leaves you positioned for a trend that never comes, and the line between perceptive and premature is thin.

Position Architect.Tagline: Never bets it all on one trade.
Position Architect.Synopsis: You manage a book, not a single trade. Every position is sized against the others, so nothing on its own can take you down.
Position Architect.Shadow: The systemic view can dilute your conviction. Managing balance so carefully can keep you from the decisive concentration that occasionally pays.

Sentiment Analyst.Synopsis: You trade the people, not the chart. Who is long, who is trapped, where the pain sits. Price is just the crowd keeping score.
Sentiment Analyst.Shadow: Reading the crowd right does not mean your timing is right. Sentiment can stay irrational longer than you can hold the position against it.

Timing Purist.Synopsis: For you the entry is the trade. A great idea at the wrong moment is still a loss, so you wait for your exact spot.
Timing Purist.Shadow: Chasing the perfect entry can leave you barely in the market at all. Your perfectionism has a cost, and sometimes it is every trade you never took.

Calibrated Maverick.Synopsis: Your ideas sound crazy, but your execution never is. The thesis runs ahead of the crowd and the discipline keeps it honest.
Calibrated Maverick.Shadow: When your discipline slips, the maverick in you runs unchecked toward chaos. When your nerve slips, you fall back into the consensus you were built to beat.

Reserved Operator.Tagline: Quiet for months, then all in.
Reserved Operator.Synopsis: You can do nothing for months without flinching. Then a trade clears your bar and you commit with real size.
Reserved Operator.Shadow: The selectivity that protects you can keep you out of perfectly good trades. Held too long, your restraint stops looking like patience and starts looking like indecision.

Intuitive Visionary.Tagline: Looks wrong, until the chart catches up.
Intuitive Visionary.Synopsis: You buy the idea long before the chart agrees. You are comfortable looking wrong for a while, because being early is how you win.
Intuitive Visionary.Shadow: The conviction that lets you see the future can dissolve your risk discipline. A thesis that is right eventually can still ruin you if you are too early or too large.
